productDisplayName: Puma Men Tango Black Flip Flops
description: Look cool on the beach in Tango from puma. The outsole with subtle grooves enhances grip, making it a great addition to the wardrobe. Upper Canvas thong straps with canvas toe separator for maximum comfort Appliqué d puma cat logo on the strap Midsole Graphic prints on insole Soft insole for comfort Outsole Rubber outsole multi directional patterns and triangular lugs for superior grip Care Rub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
